E

EIGHT - Enum constant in enum class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.Rank
 
eliminateCurrentPlayer() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.TurnManager
 
EmptyDeckException - Exception in com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions
Checked exception thrown when the deck is empty and the table pile does not have enough cards to reshuffle into a new deck.
EmptyDeckException(int) - Constructor for exception com.trifasico.x50zo.exceptions.EmptyDeckException
Constructs an EmptyDeckException indicating that both the deck and the reshuffleable portion of the table pile are exhausted.
equals(Object) - Method in record class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.Card
Two cards are equal when they share the same rank and suit.
equals(Object) - Method in record class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.GameState
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
